name: Layer
summary: This is the interface to a LayOut Layer Definition. A layer definition specifies the document-wide information about a layer. To access the entities on a layer for a given page, use LayerInstance.

methods.name: document
methods.summary: The #document method returns the Document that the Layout::Layer belongs to.
methods.remarks: The #document method returns the Document that the Layout::Layer belongs to.

methods.name: layer_instance
methods.summary: The #layer_instance method returns a Layout::LayerInstance from the Layout::Layer.
methods.remarks: The #layer_instance method returns a Layout::LayerInstance from the Layout::Layer. If the Layout::Layer is shared, a Page does not have to be provided.

throws.when: if the Layout::Layer is not shared and no page is provided

methods.name: locked?
methods.summary: The #locked? method returns whether the Layout::Layer is locked.
methods.remarks: The #locked? method returns whether the Layout::Layer is locked.

methods.name: set_nonshared
methods.summary: The #set_nonshared method sets the Layout::Layer to non-shared.
methods.remarks: The #set_nonshared method sets the Layout::Layer to non-shared. The unshare action can be one of the following values: Layout::Layer::UNSHARELAYERACTION_CLEAR Layout::Layer::UNSHARELAYERACTION_COPYTOONEPAGE Layout::Layer::UNSHARELAYERACTION_COPYTOALLPAGES

params.name: page
params.doc: The Page with the Layout::Layer to be non-shared.

params.name: unshare_action
params.doc: The share action that specifies what to do with Entitys after the Layout::Layer is non-shared.

throws.when: if unshare_action is not a valid value

methods.name: set_shared
methods.summary: The #set_shared method sets the Layout::Layer to shared.
methods.remarks: The #set_shared method sets the Layout::Layer to shared. The share action can be one of the following values: Layout::Layer::SHARELAYERACTION_CLEAR Layout::Layer::SHARELAYERACTION_KEEPONEPAGE Layout::Layer::SHARELAYERACTION_MERGEALLPAGES

params.name: page
params.doc: The Page with the Layout::Layer to be shared.

params.name: share_action
params.doc: The share action that specifies what to do with Entitys after the Layout::Layer is shared.

throws.when: if share_action is not a valid value

methods.name: shared?
methods.summary: The #shared? method returns whether the Layout::Layer is shared.
methods.remarks: The #shared? method returns whether the Layout::Layer is shared.

properties.summary: The #== method checks to see if the two Layout::Layers are equal.
properties.remarks: The #== method checks to see if the two Layout::Layers are equal. This checks whether the Ruby Objects are pointing to the same internal object.

properties.name: locked
properties.summary: The #locked= method sets whether the Layout::Layer is locked.
properties.remarks: The #locked= method sets whether the Layout::Layer is locked.

properties.name: name
properties.summary: The #name method returns the name of the Layout::Layer.
properties.remarks: The #name method returns the name of the Layout::Layer.
